focus_points.label: Late nights — temporary push or default pace?
focus_points.reason: Notes mention working late for about three weeks after delivering two major features ahead of schedule. Could be a short-term sprint, or the team may be relying on Lin to carry the load—worth clarifying which is true now that the launches are done.

focus_points.label: What Lin is driving now that launches are done
focus_points.reason: Whether the next cycle’s top work is truly the highest-leverage use of Lin’s time, or whether priorities are drifting into ongoing firefighting once the initial wins are over.

focus_points.label: What Lin should delegate vs keep personally
focus_points.reason: Whether sustained late nights are hiding a distribution or autonomy gap—worth getting explicit on which parts only Lin should own and which could move to others without losing quality or speed.

focus_points.label: What he’d want more of from you
focus_points.reason: How they want you to provide air cover and unblock decisions once the big launches are behind them—especially if they tend to brush off concern and need a clearer way to ask for help.
